postStartCommand.agent-runner-telemetry: sh -lc 'cd "${containerWorkspaceFolder}" 2>/dev/null || cd "$PWD"; run_agent_runner() { if command -v agent-runner >/dev/null 2>&1; then agent-runner -C "$PWD" "$@"; elif [ -x ./node_modules/.bin/agent-runner ]; then ./node_modules/.bin/agent-runner -C "$PWD" "$@"; elif [ -f ./dist/cli.js ]; then node ./dist/cli.js -C "$PWD" "$@"; else return 127; fi; }; if run_agent_runner telemetry start; then :; else echo "agent-runner telemetry autostart skipped or failed" >&2; fi; if run_agent_runner telemetry processor start; then :; else echo "agent-runner processor autostart skipped or failed" >&2; fi' || true
